metadata.title: Naos Baja – Modern Condominiums for Sale in Rosarito, Baja California
metadata.description: Naos Baja offers sleek, modern condominiums along the Baja California coast in Rosarito. Contemporary design meets coastal living in this stylish new development.

hero.subheadline: A design-forward beachfront community shaped by Baja's coastline. A space to pause, feel and reconnect with what's essential.

interiorExplorer.heading: Unrivaled coastal living with resort-inspired amenities

livingRoom.description: Experience a collection of interiors crafted for elevated living. From open-concept layouts to stunning finishes, every space is designed to inspire.
livingRoom.sub: Floor-to-ceiling windows, refined finishes, and seamless comfort designed for modern living.

bedroom.description: Spacious bedrooms designed as personal sanctuaries with panoramic ocean views and premium finishes that redefine restful living.
bedroom.sub: Custom cabinetry, premium flooring, and thoughtful lighting for ultimate comfort.

bathroom.description: Resort-style bathrooms featuring designer fixtures, natural stone finishes, and spa-inspired layouts for your daily ritual.
bathroom.sub: Rainfall showers, soaking tubs, and heated floors in a serene oceanfront setting.

kitchen.description: Gourmet kitchens equipped with integrated appliances, bespoke cabinetry, and premium countertops — the perfect space to create and entertain.
kitchen.sub: High-end appliances and custom millwork blended with contemporary design.

terrace.description: Private terraces with sweeping Pacific views — an extension of your living space where the inside flows seamlessly to the outdoors.
terrace.sub: Expansive outdoor areas with unobstructed ocean and coastline panoramas.

cta.body: Designed for those who seek more than just a residence, these 16 exclusive condominiums offer refined living spaces, breathtaking views, and a sense of community unlike any other.
